allow: Bash(cd "/mnt/d/CoderZone/Job posting/backend" && npm install zod 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(cd "/mnt/d/CoderZone/Job posting/backend" && npm uninstall express-validator 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(cd "/mnt/d/CoderZone/Job posting/frontend" && npm uninstall react-hook-form 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(cd "/mnt/d/CoderZone/Job posting/frontend/components" && mkdir -p layout auth profile social jobs common)

Bash(cd "/mnt/d/CoderZone/Job posting/frontend/components" && mv AppShell.tsx Sidebar.tsx TopBar.tsx Navbar.tsx Footer.tsx layout/ && mv AuthProvider.tsx AuthGate.tsx auth/ && mv ProfileAvatar.tsx ProfileCompletion.tsx ProfileCompletionCard.tsx CredibilityBadge.tsx profile/ && mv FollowButton.tsx FollowingDrawer.tsx social/ && mv JobCardSkeleton.tsx JobMatchScore.tsx jobs/ && mv Logo.tsx Breadcrumb.tsx VideoPlayer.tsx ReportModal.tsx LocationAutocomplete.tsx CompanySelector.tsx common/ && echo "done")

Bash(cd "/mnt/d/CoderZone/Job posting/frontend" && find app/ components/ lib/ hooks/ store/ -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" | xargs sed -i \\
  -e "s|@/components/AppShell|@/components/layout/AppShell|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/Sidebar|@/components/layout/Sidebar|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/TopBar|@/components/layout/TopBar|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/Navbar|@/components/layout/Navbar|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/Footer|@/components/layout/Footer|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/AuthProvider|@/components/auth/AuthProvider|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/AuthGate|@/components/auth/AuthGate|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/ProfileAvatar|@/components/profile/ProfileAvatar|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/ProfileCompletion'|@/components/profile/ProfileCompletion'|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/ProfileCompletionCard|@/components/profile/ProfileCompletionCard|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/CredibilityBadge|@/components/profile/CredibilityBadge|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/FollowButton|@/components/social/FollowButton|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/FollowingDrawer|@/components/social/FollowingDrawer|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/JobCardSkeleton|@/components/jobs/JobCardSkeleton|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/JobMatchScore|@/components/jobs/JobMatchScore|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/Logo|@/components/common/Logo|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/Breadcrumb|@/components/common/Breadcrumb|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/VideoPlayer|@/components/common/VideoPlayer|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/ReportModal|@/components/common/ReportModal|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/LocationAutocomplete|@/components/common/LocationAutocomplete|g" \\
  -e "s|@/components/CompanySelector|@/components/common/CompanySelector|g" \\
  2>/dev/null && echo "done")
